title: Armortip
description: Armortip makes it easier than ever to see what an armor looks.
body:
![ArmortipLogo](https://imgur.com/5qkuGyt.png)
## This mod shows you how the armor looks on you!


### ABOUT
Armortip makes it easier than ever to see what an armor looks.


### FEATURES
- See your Armor on your skin as u hover over it.
- See ArmorTrims Preview on your Armor.
- See Animal Armor as u hover over it.


### MISC
Feel free to include Armortip in your Modpack.

# [Feel the drip now!](https://modrinth.com/mod/armortip)
